ind_wholesale_retail.long: Share in wholesale and retail trade.

ind_education.long: Share employed in the education sector.

edu_attain_higher_secondary_plus.long: Higher secondary+ — definition derived from variable name; no codebook entry available.

edu_years_mean.long: Mean completed schooling years (top-coded at 15), pop 25+.

mig_in_domestic.long: Share of in-migrants from elsewhere in Nepal.

mig_in_international.long: Share of in-migrants from abroad (return migrants).

mig_in_from_rural.long: Share of in-migrants whose previous residence was rural.

mig_in_reason_marriage.long: Share of in-migrants whose reason was marriage.

fem_wage_share_of_employment.long: Share of female employment in wage work.

fem_ownership_land.long: Share of HHs where land is (partly) in a woman's name.

fem_ownership_both.long: Share of HHs where BOTH house and land are in a woman's name.

gap_lfp_m_minus_f.long: Male LFP minus female LFP (15-59). Shrinks with out-migration if men leave.

head_elderly_share.long: Share of HHs with elderly (60+) head.

head_young_share.long: Share of HHs with young (<30) head.

head_female_elderly.long: Share of HHs with elderly female head.

absent_hh_share.long: Share of HHs with at least one member currently abroad (absentee).

left_not_with_both.long: Share of children <16 NOT living with both parents. Direct migration-linked outcome. NA in 2001.

left_mother_only.label: Left with mother only

left_mother_only.long: Share of children <16 living with mother only (common when father is abroad).

left_father_only.long: Share of children <16 living with father only.

left_without_parents.long: Share of children <16 living without either parent (relatives/employer/other).

mar_female_married_by_18.label: Female married by 18

mar_female_married_by_18.long: Share of women 20-24 married before age 18 (child marriage).

mar_female_married_by_20.long: Share of women 20-24 married before age 20.

fert_birth_mean.label: Births (mean)
fert_birth_mean.long: Births (mean) — definition derived from variable name; no codebook entry available.

fert_birth_son_mean.label: Sons (mean)
fert_birth_son_mean.long: Sons (mean) — definition derived from variable name; no codebook entry available.

fert_birth_dau_mean.label: Daughters (mean)
fert_birth_dau_mean.long: Daughters (mean) — definition derived from variable name; no codebook entry available.

fert_births_last12m_share.long: Share of ever-married women 15-49 who had ≥1 live birth in last 12 months.

fert_births_last12m_rate.long: Mean live births in last 12 months per ever-married woman 15-49 (proxy for current fertility).

mort_children_dead_mean.label: Children dead (mean)

mort_children_dead_mean.long: Mean deceased children per ever-married woman 15-49.

mort_child_dead_any.label: Any child death

mort_child_dead_any.long: Share of EMW 15-49 reporting at least one deceased child.

mort_child_death_ratio.long: Aggregate child death ratio = sum(dead) / sum(ever-born) across EMW 15-49.

agri_hh.label: HH operates a farm
agri_hh.short: 1 if household appears in land, crop, or livestock agriculture modules; 0 otherwise.
agri_hh.long: 1 if household appears in land, crop, or livestock agriculture modules; 0 otherwise.

owned_plots_n.label: # owned plots
owned_plots_n.short: Number of owned plots reported by household.
owned_plots_n.long: Number of owned plots reported by household.

owned_area_sqm.label: Owned area (sqm)
owned_area_sqm.short: Total area of owned plots in square metres.
owned_area_sqm.long: Total area of owned plots in square metres.

cultivated_area_sqm.label: Cultivated area (sqm)
cultivated_area_sqm.short: Total cultivated area: own self-cultivated area plus rented/sharecropped-in area.
cultivated_area_sqm.long: Total cultivated area: own self-cultivated area plus rented/sharecropped-in area.

rented_in_any.label: Rented / sharecropped land in
rented_in_any.short: 1 if household rented or sharecropped in any agricultural land.
rented_in_any.long: 1 if household rented or sharecropped in any agricultural land.

plot_wet_fallow_share.label: Wet-season fallow share
plot_wet_fallow_share.short: Share of owned plots kept fallow in the wet season.
plot_wet_fallow_share.long: Share of owned plots kept fallow in the wet season.

plot_dry_fallow_share.label: Dry-season fallow share
plot_dry_fallow_share.short: Share of owned plots kept fallow in the dry season.
plot_dry_fallow_share.long: Share of owned plots kept fallow in the dry season.

double_crop_share.label: Double-cropped plot share
double_crop_share.short: Share of owned plots self-cultivated in both wet and dry seasons.
double_crop_share.long: Share of owned plots self-cultivated in both wet and dry seasons.

wet_use_fertiliser.label: Uses fertiliser (wet)
wet_use_fertiliser.short: 1 if household used fertiliser in the wet season.
wet_use_fertiliser.long: 1 if household used fertiliser in the wet season.

wet_use_pesticide.short: 1 if household used pesticide/insecticide in the wet season.
wet_use_pesticide.long: 1 if household used pesticide/insecticide in the wet season.

wet_use_hired_labour.short: 1 if household hired agricultural labour in the wet season.
wet_use_hired_labour.long: 1 if household hired agricultural labour in the wet season.

wet_use_equipment.label: Hires equipment (wet)
wet_use_equipment.short: 1 if household hired agricultural equipment in the wet season.
wet_use_equipment.long: 1 if household hired agricultural equipment in the wet season.

dry_use_fertiliser.label: Uses fertiliser (dry)
dry_use_fertiliser.short: 1 if household used fertiliser in the dry season.
dry_use_fertiliser.long: 1 if household used fertiliser in the dry season.

dry_use_pesticide.label: Uses pesticide (dry)
dry_use_pesticide.short: 1 if household used pesticide/insecticide in the dry season.
dry_use_pesticide.long: 1 if household used pesticide/insecticide in the dry season.

dry_use_hired_labour.label: Hires labour (dry)
dry_use_hired_labour.short: 1 if household hired agricultural labour in the dry season.
dry_use_hired_labour.long: 1 if household hired agricultural labour in the dry season.

dry_use_equipment.label: Hires equipment (dry)
dry_use_equipment.short: 1 if household hired agricultural equipment in the dry season.
dry_use_equipment.long: 1 if household hired agricultural equipment in the dry season.

owns_tractor.label: Owns tractor / power tiller
owns_tractor.short: 1 if household owns a tractor or power tiller.
owns_tractor.long: 1 if household owns a tractor or power tiller.

owns_pump.label: Owns water pump / tubewell
owns_pump.short: 1 if household owns a water pump, tubewell, or borewell equipment.
owns_pump.long: 1 if household owns a water pump, tubewell, or borewell equipment.

owns_modern_equip.label: Owns any modern equipment
owns_modern_equip.short: 1 if household owns any modern agricultural equipment.
owns_modern_equip.long: 1 if household owns any modern agricultural equipment.

n_modern_equip_types.label: # modern equipment types
n_modern_equip_types.short: Number of modern agricultural equipment types owned.
n_modern_equip_types.long: Number of modern agricultural equipment types owned.

ag_equip_stock_value_rs.label: Equipment stock value (all HHs)
ag_equip_stock_value_rs.short: Total value of agricultural equipment owned.
ag_equip_stock_value_rs.long: Total value of agricultural equipment owned. Raw mean = NPR 9k (median = NPR 500; 53% have raw > 0).

ag_equip_stock_value_rs_pos.label: Equipment stock value (owners only)
ag_equip_stock_value_rs_pos.short: Total value of agricultural equipment owned.
ag_equip_stock_value_rs_pos.long: Total value of agricultural equipment owned. Subsample restricted to HHs with raw > 0: mean = NPR 16k, median = NPR 2k, N = 9,615.

input_total_12m_rs.label: Total input spend (all HHs)
input_total_12m_rs.short: Total agricultural input spending across wet and dry seasons.
input_total_12m_rs.long: Total agricultural input spending across wet and dry seasons. Raw mean = NPR 7k (median = NPR 3k; 69% have raw > 0).

input_total_12m_rs_pos.label: Total input spend (cultivators only)
input_total_12m_rs_pos.short: Total agricultural input spending across wet and dry seasons.
input_total_12m_rs_pos.long: Total agricultural input spending across wet and dry seasons. Subsample restricted to HHs with raw > 0: mean = NPR 10k, median = NPR 6k, N = 12,506.

input_intensity_per_sqm.label: Input spend per cultivated sqm
input_intensity_per_sqm.short: Agricultural input spending per square metre of cultivated area.
input_intensity_per_sqm.long: Agricultural input spending per square metre of cultivated area. NA if cultivated area is zero.

n_crop_types.label: # distinct crops grown
n_crop_types.short: Number of distinct crops grown across wet and dry seasons.
n_crop_types.long: Number of distinct crops grown across wet and dry seasons.

grows_staple.label: Grows any staple crop
grows_staple.short: 1 if household grew any staple crop such as rice/paddy, wheat, maize, millet, or barley.
grows_staple.long: 1 if household grew any staple crop such as rice/paddy, wheat, maize, millet, or barley.

grows_cashcrop.label: Grows any cash crop
grows_cashcrop.short: 1 if household grew any cash crop such as sugarcane, jute, tobacco, cardamom, tea, mustard, or oilseed.
grows_cashcrop.long: 1 if household grew any cash crop such as sugarcane, jute, tobacco, cardamom, tea, mustard, or oilseed.

grows_horticulture.label: Grows fruits / vegetables
grows_horticulture.short: 1 if household grew any fruits or vegetables.
grows_horticulture.long: 1 if household grew any fruits or vegetables.

crop_sold_any.label: Sold any crop
crop_sold_any.short: 1 if household sold any crop output in either season.
crop_sold_any.long: 1 if household sold any crop output in either season.

crop_sales_12m_rs.label: Crop sales (all HHs)
crop_sales_12m_rs.short: Total crop sales value across wet and dry seasons.
crop_sales_12m_rs.long: Total crop sales value across wet and dry seasons. Raw mean = NPR 36k (median = NPR 0; 30% have raw > 0; conditional median = NPR 20k).

crop_sales_12m_rs_pos.label: Crop sales (sellers only)
crop_sales_12m_rs_pos.short: Total crop sales value across wet and dry seasons.
crop_sales_12m_rs_pos.long: Total crop sales value across wet and dry seasons. Subsample restricted to HHs with raw > 0: mean = NPR 1.2 lakh, median = NPR 20k, N = 5,463.

crop_sale_share.label: Crop sale share
crop_sale_share.short: Mean crop-level share of harvest sold.
crop_sale_share.long: Mean crop-level share of harvest sold. NA if no crop harvest quantity is observed.

has_migrant.label: HH has any migrant
has_migrant.short: 1 if household has at least one migrant, either internal or overseas; 0 otherwise.
has_migrant.long: 1 if household has at least one migrant, either internal or overseas; 0 otherwise.

has_migrant_internal.label: HH has internal migrant
has_migrant_internal.short: 1 if household has at least one internal migrant within Nepal; 0 otherwise.
has_migrant_internal.long: 1 if household has at least one internal migrant within Nepal; 0 otherwise.

mig_cost_financed_by_loan_any.label: Migration financed by loan
mig_cost_financed_by_loan_any.short: 1 if any migrant in the household financed migration costs using a loan; 0 otherwise.
mig_cost_financed_by_loan_any.long: 1 if any migrant in the household financed migration costs using a loan; 0 otherwise.

remit_received.label: Remittance received
remit_received.short: 1 if any migrant sent remittance to the household in the past 12 months; 0 otherwise.
remit_received.long: 1 if any migrant sent remittance to the household in the past 12 months; 0 otherwise.

remit_amount_12m_rs.label: Remit amount (all HHs)
remit_amount_12m_rs.short: Total remittance amount received by the household from all migrants in the past 12 months, in rupees.
remit_amount_12m_rs.long: Total remittance amount received by the household from all migrants in the past 12 months, in rupees. Raw mean = NPR 62k (median = NPR 0; 33% have raw > 0; conditional median = NPR 1.2 lakh).

remit_amount_12m_rs_pos.label: Remit amount (recipients only)
remit_amount_12m_rs_pos.short: Total remittance amount received by the household from all migrants in the past 12 months, in rupees.
remit_amount_12m_rs_pos.long: Total remittance amount received by the household from all migrants in the past 12 months, in rupees. Subsample restricted to HHs with raw > 0: mean = NPR 1.9 lakh, median = NPR 1.2 lakh, N = 6,015.

remit_amount_intl_12m_rs.label: Remit amount intl (all HHs)
remit_amount_intl_12m_rs.short: Total remittance amount received from international migrants only in the past 12 months, in rupees.
remit_amount_intl_12m_rs.long: Total remittance amount received from international migrants only in the past 12 months, in rupees. Raw mean = NPR 58k (median = NPR 0; 28% have raw > 0; conditional median = NPR 1.5 lakh).

remit_amount_intl_12m_rs_pos.label: Remit amount intl (recipients)
remit_amount_intl_12m_rs_pos.short: Total remittance amount received from international migrants only in the past 12 months, in rupees.
remit_amount_intl_12m_rs_pos.long: Total remittance amount received from international migrants only in the past 12 months, in rupees. Subsample restricted to HHs with raw > 0: mean = NPR 2.1 lakh, median = NPR 1.5 lakh, N = 4,983.

remit_via_formal_any.label: Remit via bank / IME
remit_via_formal_any.short: 1 if any migrant sent remittance through bank or IME/formal channel; 0 otherwise.
remit_via_formal_any.long: 1 if any migrant sent remittance through bank or IME/formal channel; 0 otherwise.

remit_via_hundi_any.label: Remit via hundi
remit_via_hundi_any.short: 1 if any migrant sent remittance through hundi/informal channel; 0 otherwise.
remit_via_hundi_any.long: 1 if any migrant sent remittance through hundi/informal channel; 0 otherwise.

remit_use_consumption_any.label: Remit → consumption
remit_use_consumption_any.short: 1 if any remittance was used for non-durable consumption or ceremonies; 0 otherwise.
remit_use_consumption_any.long: 1 if any remittance was used for non-durable consumption or ceremonies; 0 otherwise.

remit_use_education_any.label: Remit → education
remit_use_education_any.short: 1 if any remittance was used for education expenses; 0 otherwise.
remit_use_education_any.long: 1 if any remittance was used for education expenses; 0 otherwise.

remit_use_business_any.label: Remit → business / productive
remit_use_business_any.short: 1 if any remittance was used for productive investment, including business inputs, business equipment, land, livestock, or other business purposes; 0 otherwise.
remit_use_business_any.long: 1 if any remittance was used for productive investment, including business inputs, business equipment, land, livestock, or other business purposes; 0 otherwise.

n_jobs_total.label: # jobs in HH
n_jobs_total.short: Total number of jobs across all HH members.
n_jobs_total.long: Total number of jobs across all HH members.

share_wage_agri.label: Share of jobs: wage agri
share_wage_agri.short: Share of HH's jobs that are wage employment in agriculture.
share_wage_agri.long: Share of HH's jobs that are wage employment in agriculture.

share_wage_nonagri.label: Share of jobs: wage non-agri
share_wage_nonagri.short: Share of HH's jobs that are wage employment not in agriculture.
share_wage_nonagri.long: Share of HH's jobs that are wage employment not in agriculture.

share_self_agri.label: Share of jobs: self-emp agri
share_self_agri.short: Share of HH's jobs that are self-employment in agriculture.
share_self_agri.long: Share of HH's jobs that are self-employment in agriculture.

share_self_nonagri.label: Share of jobs: self-emp non-agri
share_self_nonagri.short: Share of HH's jobs that are self-employment not in agriculture.
share_self_nonagri.long: Share of HH's jobs that are self-employment not in agriculture.

hh_has_wage_job.label: Any wage job in HH
hh_has_wage_job.short: 1 if any HH member has a Section 8 wage job record.
hh_has_wage_job.long: 1 if any HH member has a Section 8 wage job record.

n_wage_jobs_hh.label: # wage jobs in HH
n_wage_jobs_hh.short: Total number of Section 8 wage jobs in the HH.
n_wage_jobs_hh.long: Total number of Section 8 wage jobs in the HH.

wage_total_income_12m_rs.label: Wage income (all HHs)
wage_total_income_12m_rs.long: Total wage Rs. = daily (s08q06×days) + long-term (12·s08q12a + s08q12b..e) + contract (s08q13). Raw mean = NPR 79k (median = NPR 0; 43% have raw > 0; conditional median = NPR 1.4 lakh).

wage_total_income_12m_rs_pos.label: Wage income (earners only)
wage_total_income_12m_rs_pos.long: Total wage Rs. = daily (s08q06×days) + long-term (12·s08q12a + s08q12b..e) + contract (s08q13). Subsample restricted to HHs with raw > 0: mean = NPR 1.8 lakh, median = NPR 1.4 lakh, N = 7,758.

wage_sector_primary_any.label: Any primary-sector wage job
wage_sector_primary_any.short: 1 if any member has a wage job in primary sector (Agriculture, Fishing, Mining).
wage_sector_primary_any.long: 1 if any member has a wage job in primary sector (Agriculture, Fishing, Mining).

wage_sector_secondary_any.label: Any secondary-sector wage job
wage_sector_secondary_any.short: 1 if any member in secondary sector (Manufacturing, Utilities, Construction).
wage_sector_secondary_any.long: 1 if any member in secondary sector (Manufacturing, Utilities, Construction).

wage_sector_tertiary_any.label: Any tertiary-sector wage job
wage_sector_tertiary_any.short: 1 if any member in tertiary sector (Trade, Hotels, Transport, Finance, Public, Community).
wage_sector_tertiary_any.long: 1 if any member in tertiary sector (Trade, Hotels, Transport, Finance, Public, Community).

has_nonag_enterprise.label: Has non-farm enterprise
has_nonag_enterprise.short: 1 if household operated any non-agricultural enterprise; 0 otherwise.
has_nonag_enterprise.long: 1 if household operated any non-agricultural enterprise; 0 otherwise.

n_nonag_enterprises.label: # non-farm enterprises
n_nonag_enterprises.short: Number of non-agricultural enterprises operated by household.
n_nonag_enterprises.long: Number of non-agricultural enterprises operated by household.

enterprise_workers_total.label: Total enterprise workers
enterprise_workers_total.short: Total workers across all household non-agricultural enterprises.
enterprise_workers_total.long: Total workers across all household non-agricultural enterprises.

enterprise_revenue_12m.label: Revenue (all HHs)
enterprise_revenue_12m.short: Total gross revenue across all household non-agricultural enterprises.
enterprise_revenue_12m.long: Total gross revenue across all household non-agricultural enterprises. Raw mean = NPR 53k (median = NPR 0; 10% have raw > 0; conditional median = NPR 2.5 lakh).

enterprise_revenue_12m_pos.label: Revenue (operators only)
enterprise_revenue_12m_pos.short: Total gross revenue across all household non-agricultural enterprises.
enterprise_revenue_12m_pos.long: Total gross revenue across all household non-agricultural enterprises. Subsample restricted to HHs with raw > 0: mean = NPR 5.1 lakh, median = NPR 2.5 lakh, N = 1,891.

enterprise_expenses_12m.label: Expenses (all HHs)
enterprise_expenses_12m.short: Total operating expenses: wages, fuel/utilities, raw materials, and other expenses.
enterprise_expenses_12m.long: Total operating expenses: wages, fuel/utilities, raw materials, and other expenses. Raw mean = NPR 33k (median = NPR 0; 10% have raw > 0; conditional median = NPR 1.1 lakh).

enterprise_expenses_12m_pos.label: Expenses (operators only)
enterprise_expenses_12m_pos.short: Total operating expenses: wages, fuel/utilities, raw materials, and other expenses.
enterprise_expenses_12m_pos.long: Total operating expenses: wages, fuel/utilities, raw materials, and other expenses. Subsample restricted to HHs with raw > 0: mean = NPR 3.2 lakh, median = NPR 1.1 lakh, N = 1,835.

enterprise_profit_12m.label: Profit (all HHs)
enterprise_profit_12m.short: Operating profit across all household enterprises.
enterprise_profit_12m.long: Operating profit across all household enterprises. Capital expenditure is not subtracted. Raw mean = NPR 20k (median = NPR 0; 10% have raw > 0; conditional median = NPR 1.3 lakh).

enterprise_profit_12m_pos.label: Profit (operators only)
enterprise_profit_12m_pos.short: Operating profit across all household enterprises.
enterprise_profit_12m_pos.long: Operating profit across all household enterprises. Capital expenditure is not subtracted. Subsample restricted to HHs with raw > 0: mean = NPR 2.3 lakh, median = NPR 1.3 lakh, N = 1,732.

enterprise_capex_12m.label: Capex (all HHs)
enterprise_capex_12m.long: Capital expenditure on business assets. Raw mean = NPR 11k (median = NPR 0; 7% have raw > 0; conditional median = NPR 50k).

enterprise_capex_12m_pos.label: Capex (operators with capex)
enterprise_capex_12m_pos.long: Capital expenditure on business assets. Subsample restricted to HHs with raw > 0: mean = NPR 1.7 lakh, median = NPR 50k, N = 1,183.

enterprise_profit_margin.label: Profit margin (operators)
enterprise_profit_margin.short: Profit divided by revenue, defined only for enterprise households with positive revenue.
enterprise_profit_margin.long: Profit divided by revenue, defined only for enterprise households with positive revenue.

sector_agriculture_share.label: Share in agri / forestry / fish
sector_agriculture_share.short: Share of household enterprises in agriculture, forestry, or fishing.
sector_agriculture_share.long: Share of household enterprises in agriculture, forestry, or fishing.

sector_manufacturing_construction_share.label: Share in manuf / construction
sector_manufacturing_construction_share.short: Share of household enterprises in mining, manufacturing, utilities, water/waste, or construction.
sector_manufacturing_construction_share.long: Share of household enterprises in mining, manufacturing, utilities, water/waste, or construction.

sector_services_share.label: Share in services
sector_services_share.short: Share of household enterprises in trade, accommodation/food, transport, communication, finance, real estate, professional services, public administration, education, health, and other services.
sector_services_share.long: Share of household enterprises in trade, accommodation/food, transport, communication, finance, real estate, professional services, public administration, education, health, and other services.

food_total_7day.label: Food total (7d)
food_total_7day.short: Total food value excluding gifts/in-kind: home-produced plus purchased food.
food_total_7day.long: Total food value excluding gifts/in-kind: home-produced plus purchased food. Raw mean = NPR 2k (median = NPR 2k; 100% have raw > 0).

food_purchased_7day.label: Food purchased (7d)
food_purchased_7day.long: Rs. value of food purchased from the market in the past 7 days. Raw mean = NPR 1k (median = NPR 1k; 100% have raw > 0).

food_homeprod_7day.label: Food from own production (7d)
food_homeprod_7day.long: Rs. market value of food consumed from household own production in the past 7 days. Raw mean = NPR 806 (median = NPR 650; 88% have raw > 0).

food_homeprod_share.label: Share of food from own production
food_homeprod_share.short: Share of food value sourced from own production: home-produced / (home-produced + purchased).
food_homeprod_share.long: Share of food value sourced from own production: home-produced / (home-produced + purchased). Excludes gifts/in-kind.

food_staples_7day.label: Staples (7d)
food_staples_7day.long: Rs. value of staples: rice, wheat flour, maize, maize flour, millet, barley, beaten rice, potatoes. Raw mean = NPR 726 (median = NPR 645; 100% have raw > 0).

food_protein_7day.label: Protein foods (7d)
food_protein_7day.long: Rs. value of protein foods: pulses, meat/fish, dairy, and eggs. Raw mean = NPR 684 (median = NPR 550; 97% have raw > 0).

food_animal_7day.label: Animal-source foods (7d)
food_animal_7day.long: Rs. value of animal-source foods: meat/fish, dairy, and eggs. Raw mean = NPR 545 (median = NPR 420; 82% have raw > 0).

food_vegfruit_7day.label: Vegetables / fruit (7d)
food_vegfruit_7day.long: Rs. value of vegetables, fruits, and dried fruits/nuts. Raw mean = NPR 266 (median = NPR 220; 98% have raw > 0).

food_groups_consumed.label: # food groups consumed
food_groups_consumed.short: Number of detailed food groups with positive consumption value.
food_groups_consumed.long: Number of detailed food groups with positive consumption value.

perceived_food_insecurity.label: Perceived food insecurity
perceived_food_insecurity.short: Binary indicator equal to 1 if household worried about food availability during the reference period; 0 otherwise.
perceived_food_insecurity.long: Binary indicator equal to 1 if household worried about food availability during the reference period; 0 otherwise.

food_insec_any.label: Any realized food insecurity
food_insec_any.short: Binary indicator equal to 1 if household reported any realized food insecurity experience at least rarely on one or more of the 8 items.
food_insec_any.long: Binary indicator equal to 1 if household reported any realized food insecurity experience at least rarely on one or more of the 8 items.

food_insec_index.label: Food insecurity breadth index
food_insec_index.short: Breadth index: number of affirmed food insecurity items divided by number of valid answered items.
food_insec_index.long: Breadth index: number of affirmed food insecurity items divided by number of valid answered items. Ranges from 0 to 1.

severe_food_insecurity.label: Severe food insecurity
severe_food_insecurity.short: Binary indicator equal to 1 if household reported severe hardship: no food, went to sleep hungry, or went a whole day/night without eating.
severe_food_insecurity.long: Binary indicator equal to 1 if household reported severe hardship: no food, went to sleep hungry, or went a whole day/night without eating.

nonfood_exp_30day.label: Non-food exp (30d)
nonfood_exp_30day.short: Total frequent non-food spending over the past 30 days.
nonfood_exp_30day.long: Total frequent non-food spending over the past 30 days. Raw mean = NPR 2k (median = NPR 950; 95% have raw > 0).

nonfood_exp_12m.label: Non-food exp (12m)
nonfood_exp_12m.short: Total non-food spending over the past 12 months.
nonfood_exp_12m.long: Total non-food spending over the past 12 months. Raw mean = NPR 90k (median = NPR 43k).

nonfood_basic_nonfood_12m.label: Basic non-food (12m)
nonfood_basic_nonfood_12m.short: Basic recurrent non-food goods: personal care and household cleaning items.
nonfood_basic_nonfood_12m.long: Basic recurrent non-food goods: personal care and household cleaning items. Raw mean = NPR 4k (median = NPR 3k; 100% have raw > 0).

nonfood_energy_fuel_lighting_12m.label: Energy / fuel / lighting (12m)
nonfood_energy_fuel_lighting_12m.short: Energy, fuel, and lighting: LPG, kerosene, wood, coal, candles, matches, bulbs, batteries.
nonfood_energy_fuel_lighting_12m.long: Energy, fuel, and lighting: LPG, kerosene, wood, coal, candles, matches, bulbs, batteries. Raw mean = NPR 4k (median = NPR 3k; 100% have raw > 0).

nonfood_clothing_personal_12m.label: Clothing / personal (12m)
nonfood_clothing_personal_12m.short: Clothing, footwear, personal grooming, and clothing-related services.
nonfood_clothing_personal_12m.long: Clothing, footwear, personal grooming, and clothing-related services. Raw mean = NPR 12k (median = NPR 10k; 99% have raw > 0).

nonfood_transport_communication_12m.label: Transport / communication (12m)
nonfood_transport_communication_12m.short: Transport, fuel for vehicles, vehicle purchase/repair, public transport, telephone, mobile, postal, fax.
nonfood_transport_communication_12m.long: Transport, fuel for vehicles, vehicle purchase/repair, public transport, telephone, mobile, postal, fax. Raw mean = NPR 13k (median = NPR 4k; 93% have raw > 0).

nonfood_housing_household_12m.label: Housing / household goods (all HHs)
nonfood_housing_household_12m.short: Housing repairs, home improvement, household goods, furniture, appliances, utensils, bedding, and household repairs.
nonfood_housing_household_12m.long: Housing repairs, home improvement, household goods, furniture, appliances, utensils, bedding, and household repairs. Raw mean = NPR 27k (median = NPR 800; 57% have raw > 0).

nonfood_housing_household_12m_pos.label: Housing / household goods (spenders only)
nonfood_housing_household_12m_pos.short: Housing repairs, home improvement, household goods, furniture, appliances, utensils, bedding, and household repairs.
nonfood_housing_household_12m_pos.long: Housing repairs, home improvement, household goods, furniture, appliances, utensils, bedding, and household repairs. Subsample restricted to HHs with raw > 0: mean = NPR 48k, median = NPR 4k, N = 10,320.

nonfood_education_leisure_12m.label: Education / leisure (12m)
nonfood_education_leisure_12m.short: Books, newspapers, stationery, entertainment, toys, sports, holidays, TV/radio/camera/computer-related leisure goods.
nonfood_education_leisure_12m.long: Books, newspapers, stationery, entertainment, toys, sports, holidays, TV/radio/camera/computer-related leisure goods. Raw mean = NPR 501 (median = NPR 0; 11% have raw > 0; conditional median = NPR 1k).

nonfood_social_ceremonial_financial_12m.label: Social / ceremony / finance (12m)
nonfood_social_ceremonial_financial_12m.short: Religious ceremonies, marriage/birth/funeral expenses, taxes, legal/insurance, domestic wages, and pocket money.
nonfood_social_ceremonial_financial_12m.long: Religious ceremonies, marriage/birth/funeral expenses, taxes, legal/insurance, domestic wages, and pocket money. Raw mean = NPR 26k (median = NPR 12k; 96% have raw > 0).

nonfood_luxury_valuables_12m.label: Jewellery / luxury (all HHs)
nonfood_luxury_valuables_12m.long: Jewelry and watches. Raw mean = NPR 2k (median = NPR 0; 7% have raw > 0; conditional median = NPR 15k).

nonfood_luxury_valuables_12m_pos.label: Jewellery / luxury (buyers only)
nonfood_luxury_valuables_12m_pos.long: Jewelry and watches. Subsample restricted to HHs with raw > 0: mean = NPR 36k, median = NPR 15k, N = 1,222.

durables_stock_value.label: Durables stock value
durables_stock_value.long: Rs. current market value of all durable goods owned by household. Raw mean = NPR 1.5 lakh (median = NPR 92k; 100% have raw > 0).

durables_use_value_12m.label: Imputed durables consumption (12m)
durables_use_value_12m.short: Imputed annual consumption flow from durables, calculated as 10 percent of durable stock value.
durables_use_value_12m.long: Imputed annual consumption flow from durables, calculated as 10 percent of durable stock value. Raw mean = NPR 15k (median = NPR 9k; 100% have raw > 0).

any_enrolled.label: Any school enrollment
any_enrolled.short: 1 if any HH member currently attending.
any_enrolled.long: 1 if any HH member currently attending

n_private_school.label: # in private school
n_private_school.short: Count of currently-attending members in private/institutional schools.
n_private_school.long: Count of currently-attending members in private/institutional schools

scholarship_amt_12m.label: Scholarship amount (12m)
scholarship_amt_12m.long: Sum of scholarship amounts (Rs., 12m). Raw mean = NPR 326 (median = NPR 0; 20% have raw > 0; conditional median = NPR 430).

edu_spend_total_12m.label: Education spend (all HHs)
edu_spend_total_12m.short: Sum of all six education sub-categories.
edu_spend_total_12m.long: Sum of all six education sub-categories. Raw mean = NPR 15k (median = NPR 6k; 67% have raw > 0).

edu_spend_total_12m_pos.label: Education spend (spenders only)
edu_spend_total_12m_pos.short: Sum of all six education sub-categories.
edu_spend_total_12m_pos.long: Sum of all six education sub-categories. Subsample restricted to HHs with raw > 0: mean = NPR 23k, median = NPR 13k, N = 11,763.

edu_spend_per_enrolled.label: Education spend per enrolled child
edu_spend_per_enrolled.long: Total education spend / n_enrolled (NA if 0). Raw mean = NPR 12k (median = NPR 7k; 98% have raw > 0).

any_insured.label: Any health card holder
any_insured.short: 1 if any member has health card.
any_insured.long: 1 if any member has health card

n_chronic.label: # members with chronic illness
n_chronic.short: Count of members with chronic illness.
n_chronic.long: Count of members with chronic illness

n_acute_illness.label: # members with acute illness (30d)
n_acute_illness.short: Count of members with acute illness (past 30d).
n_acute_illness.long: Count of members with acute illness (past 30d)

any_health_spending.label: Any health spending
any_health_spending.short: 1 if HH had any medical spending.
any_health_spending.long: 1 if HH had any medical spending

hlt_spend_total.label: Health spend total (all HHs)
hlt_spend_total.short: Sum of all five health sub-categories.
hlt_spend_total.long: Sum of all five health sub-categories. Raw mean = NPR 13k (median = NPR 2k; 78% have raw > 0).

hlt_spend_total_pos.label: Health spend total (spenders only)
hlt_spend_total_pos.short: Sum of all five health sub-categories.
hlt_spend_total_pos.long: Sum of all five health sub-categories. Subsample restricted to HHs with raw > 0: mean = NPR 16k, median = NPR 5k, N = 13,711.

any_shock.label: HH reports any shock
any_shock.short: 1 if HH reported any shock in past 12m.
any_shock.long: 1 if HH reported any shock in past 12m.

coped_self.label: Cope: own resources
coped_self.short: 1 if HH used own resources to cope (savings/reduced consumption, selling assets, or borrowing) for any shock.
coped_self.long: 1 if HH used own resources to cope (savings/reduced consumption, selling assets, or borrowing) for any shock.

coped_external.label: Cope: external help
coped_external.short: 1 if HH used outside resources to cope (private transfers from family/community, govt/NGO assistance, or remittances) for any shock.
coped_external.long: 1 if HH used outside resources to cope (private transfers from family/community, govt/NGO assistance, or remittances) for any shock.

n_firms.label: # firms
n_firms.short: Number of firms in municipality (2018 NEC).
n_firms.long: Number of firms in municipality (2018 NEC). Raw mean = 1,225 firms (median = 612.5 firms).

emp_total.label: Total employment
emp_total.short: Total employment across all firms in muni.
emp_total.long: Total employment across all firms in muni. Raw mean = 4,282 workers (median = 1,673 workers).
